dimensions.adaptability: registry supports sidecar declarations and future native contracts
dimensions.completeness: spec policy schema gate fixtures eval invariant registry installed
dimensions.comprehensibility: module header contract and stable reason codes
dimensions.debuggability: gate returns exact missing/mismatch reason codes
dimensions.observability: receipt/handoff/support proof record the decision and validation
dimensions.recursive_improvement: next stage export or broader contract rewrite queued
dimensions.regression_resistance: fixtures lock missing flag and mismatch regressions
dimensions.security: code-bearing false negatives are denied before code acceptance
dimensions.testability: positive and negative fixtures plus eval
